Name: 0_host_recommend_comfortable_subway
Representative_Docs: ["we had a great stay in this wonderful apartment the apartment was to a high standard and you were provided with everything needed to make it a home it was a beautiful base in a beautiful area steven was extremely sweet and helpful overall a fabulous experience this is a great accommodation cozy and charming true to pictures and great location the owner was very responsive to any questions or concerns i had i highly recommend this property this is a great apt in a wonderful uws location it made my time off work a breeze with great markets the park great shopping and food all within blocks steven is an excellent host and the apt was stocked with everything you need to be comfortable and he provided a welcome letter that exactly directed me to all my soon to be favorites in the neighborhood i highly recommend his place got transferred for work to new york city and needed to move within a month from the west coast i needed to find a long term rental and randomly came across steven's posting for this apartment in the upper west side not quite sure about the location i booked with steven because of three reasons his responsiveness and willingness to answer my many questions the beautiful decor of the apartment he promised me they had yes network and cable tv overall this was such a great experience and stay although i could go on forever about some of the reasons i'll highlight a few below air conditioner there was a heat wave and getting into the apartment and turning on the ac with the remote control brought so much relief there is also a great ceiling fan in the bedroom quiet the neighbors were all respectful and quiet it is a back unit so was also quiet because of this neighborhood i got lucky here because i wasn't familar with the th block of upper west side it was amazing great restauraunts and convenience stores all around close to a big museum and central park walked everywhere with a smile on my face i commuted from midtown east for work and felt like i was coming back to an oasis every day returning home i also just found a more permanent apartment in the same neighborhood because i loved it so much there is also a great laundry place near by that i did wash and fold at they were great family owned business also the hosts steven and his counterpart alex were incredibly accomodating and gracious hosts alex helped me bring my bags up to the apartment remember i just moved from cross country and then again to the cab to my new apartment when i checked out this was very helpful steven was readily available and gave me great advice on finding a long term apartment via text and phone above and beyond service huge tv the tv in the living room was amazing and huge i actually just went to the store and bought the same one yesterday and even texted steven to ask how he mounted it to the wall of course he responded and gave me advice super host loved watching my yankees every night on tv desk space great work area for people that need to work from home wifi is fast and adequate for business use cleanliness and comfort the airbnb was extremely clean and the bed was comfortable the sheets and blankets are so comfortable like a hotel again yes i asked steven where he got them and then went to bed bath and beyond and bought the same ones all in all i would highly recommend this spot the reason i wrote such a detailed review is because of how much i appreciated steven being such a great host and i wanted others to know steven was a lovely host extremely accessible and supportive leading up to and during my stay check in was seamless and i had no issues with the property the area is lovely full of shops and attractions central park is two blocks away overall i tremendously enjoyed my time here and would warmly encourage this property and working with steven", "my wife and i were very fortunate to be paulo's first guests he is very warm and friendly person with a wonderful personality he walked us around his neighborhood in astoria so we would be comfortable with the neighborhood he went above and beyond our expectations in making us feel comfortable he is a fantastic host and a joy to be around and it was really nice learning about his native brazil he was constantly considering us and ensuring we were comfortable we had great communication with each other and we got along with him so well that we went out for drinks together his entire place is nicely decorated and clean and a short distance to manhattan we stayed with him for nights and i highly recommend anyone to stay at paulo's place he is a wonderful person and meeting him was one of the highlights of our trip thank you paulo my boyfriend and i spent the weekend in paulo's place our stay was excellent the apartment is so close to the airport and the subways everything is about minutes away the apartment was clean spacious and felt very welcoming paulo was very accessible from my first inquiry about the apartment until we left he was very considerate of our needs and really made us feel at home i have done temporary sublets via other websites and this was by far my best experience astoria is underrated people do not understand the variety of restaurants in the area and other amenities it was a great trip paulo is a great host he is incredibly organized and his place is clean quiet and nicely decorated paulo was very giving of his time and was always accessible to answer questions his location is an easy walk to two subway stations restaurants and shops i recommend paulo very highly as a host paulo was amazing right after we booked he made sure to let us in early so we could drop our things and immediately treated us like friends rather than guests the place is great big and clean paulo made sure that we were comfortable and even let us leave big suitcases and a huge box around his place after we left as we had some trouble taking everything at once i would always stay with such a lovely and sweet person again paulo and his hospitality was absolutely the best that could have happened to us we booked at very short notice and paulo responded immediately in a very nice and friendly way even running a bit late as we got stuck at the airport paulo was waiting for us to welcome us personally the apartment is great we just loved it it is very nice and cozy and offers everything you need to feel comfortable the location of the flat is absolutely perfect just a min walk to the underground which takes you directly to the center of manhattan central park times square soho etc within a few minutes astoria is very cute as well and offers supermarkets coffee shops bars and restaurants just around the corner paulo himself is a great host very friendly polite interested and never tired to answer any kind of question or to assist with tips and recommendations needless to say where we will stay on our next visit to ny", 'tim is a very accomodating responsive and friendly landlord living in his space for the summer was the first time i had ever lived in new york and his apartment was a key factor in me developing such a connection to the city the location in harlem is perfect for those who want to be in manhattan but at the same time want to distance themselves from the constant hustle and bustle of the city it is also very close to multiple subway lines making it very accessible to midtown and downtown furthermore the apartment is truly a luxury apartment decorated and furnished with state of the art ammenities this space is perfect for any type of guest and i highly recommend it to anybody looking to stay either short term or long term in the city thanks tim for such a wonderful summer and i look forward to renting from you in the future i could not have made a better choice for my stay in new york than this the spacious and airy apartment has been furnished with style high quality and consideration for a stay of both business and leisure the facilities are of highest standard and brand new the flat is ideally situated on the nyc metro map particularly for doing business on the upper east and upper west side i immensely enjoyed the neighborhood with its trendy restaurants just around the corner from the quiet and residential street on which the lovely brown stone townhouse is located my husband and i were delighted to meet our landlords whose care in ensuring my time in their apartment would be the best possible has been outstanding we quickly felt like guest in the great home of two welcoming hosts with whom we got to enjoy many good conversations and much rewarding trips to the city and its beautiful surroundings whenever we come to new york next we will check if the apartment is available first in the meantime we hope they will come to visit us in italy and germany as we left with the feeling of having met not only two great people but found new friends great apartment wonderful hosts good neighborhood highly recommend the apartment has plenty of space and it is quiet both features so rare in manhattan very nicely decorated and has everything one needs for a comfortable and enjoyable stay well equipped kitchen for cooking nice bathroom big comfy bedroom a washing machine and a dryer in the building etc in addition the apartment is close to several subway lines making the trip to other parts of manhattan easy and fast especially convenient when spending time on the upper east side or upper west side the neighborhood is safe has grocery stores and many nice restaurants within walking distance we really enjoyed the apartment also comes with the best hosts they helped us with anything we needed and we really enjoyed their company this made our stay a really great airbnb experience tim s deep knowledge of nyc and much beyond was a special joy we look forward to seeing them again in nyc and hope they will pay us a visit in helsinki we highly recommend tim s apartment for anyone coming to new york for business or leisure super very comfortable stay apartment completely furnished with all necessary utensils and accessories all items are of extremely high quality and the environment makes us feel like we were at home no detail was left behind everything is very well maintained by the host host very polite thoughtful gentle he is a very nice guy the street is very quiet close to metro stations close to markets and pharmacies it was a very satisfying experience i would like to stay in this apartment again when i return to new york thanks timothy was a welcoming and thoughtful host his place came equipped with everything needed for a comfortable stay it was the perfect place to stay in harlem']
